good:
Build accessibility as a quality floor with responsive layouts and visible keyboard focus.
Establish a deliberate type scale so typography carries personality.
Set up a compact color token system of 4-6 named hex values to keep the palette consistent.
Bundle the artifact into a single self-contained HTML file with all assets inlined for portability.
Critique your own work and avoid generic AI-generated design. (merged from frontend-design and web-artifacts-builder)
bad:
Set up a compact color token system of 4-6 named hex values to keep the palette consistent.
Critique your own work and avoid generic AI-generated design that resembles the standard warm-cream-and-terracotta template.
Bundle the artifact into a single self-contained HTML file with all assets inlined for portability.
Steer away from purple gradients and the Inter font to avoid generic AI-generated design.
